 Access flag bits for a control.

static void control_print (const control_t *control, int(*print_func)(const char *,...), const char *indent)
 Print a control descriptor to an output using the provided print function.
 

Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Defines the ctrl_flags_t access flags and the control_t structure that fully describes a single configurable parameter exposed by a media element.

Macro Definition Documentation

◆ CTRL_FLAGS_DYNAMIC

#define CTRL_FLAGS_DYNAMIC

Dynamic control: can be set at any time.

◆ CTRL_FLAGS_NONE

#define CTRL_FLAGS_NONE

No flags set.

◆ CTRL_FLAGS_READABLE

#define CTRL_FLAGS_READABLE

Control value can be read.

◆ CTRL_FLAGS_STATIC

#define CTRL_FLAGS_STATIC

Static control: can be set at any time before prepare.

◆ CTRL_FLAGS_WRITABLE

#define CTRL_FLAGS_WRITABLE

Control value can be written.

Function Documentation

◆ control_print()

static void control_print ( const control_t * control,
int(* print_func )(const char *,...),
const char * indent )
static
Parameters
[in]controlPointer to the control to print.
[in]print_funcPrintf-like callback used for output.
[in]indentPrefix string prepended to each output line.
